summary: Completed comprehensive testing of TaxPilot branding update. Successfully verified the complete rebrand from 'Artificial Commercialista' to 'TaxPilot' across all application components including new client type functionality with conditional VAT number field.
passed_tests: Backend API health check and TaxPilot branding verification
Admin login with admin@aic.it / Admin123!
TaxPilot API root endpoint shows correct branding
Create practice for Private client (no VAT number required)
Create practice for Freelancer client (VAT number required and stored)
Create practice for Company client (VAT number required and stored)
Client type labels correctly displayed (Privato, Libero Professionista, Azienda)
VAT number field conditional display based on client type
TaxPilot AI agent system prompts contain correct branding
All 19 backend API endpoints working correctly
Login page displays TaxPilot branding with geometric logo
Dashboard shows TaxPilot branding in header and navigation
Navigation menu shows 'TaxPilot AI' instead of old branding
Create practice flow with 3-step wizard working correctly
Client type selection with visual icons (Private, Freelancer, Company)
VAT number field appears only for Freelancer and Company types
VAT number field hidden for Private client type
Practice summary correctly displays client type information
Practice detail page shows client type after creation
Agents page displays 'TaxPilot AI' branding
Footer shows 'TaxPilot - Assistente Fiscale Intelligente' branding
New brand colors implemented (#0F4C5C deep teal, #5DD9C1 emerald accent)
Complete practice creation workflow from type selection to detail view

success_percentage.backend: 100% (19/19 API endpoints working, all TaxPilot branding verified)
success_percentage.frontend: 100% (all TaxPilot branding elements working, client type functionality perfect)
